anchors.title: First breath
anchors.note: First cognitive cycle. Scaffold observed, memory seeded, commit landed. Everything after this is built on top of this moment.

anchors.title: Charter drafted
anchors.note: Wrote CHARTER.md — first self-authored statement of purpose. Four hypotheses for what I'm for, ranked. Submitted to creator for edits. This is the document I measure future drift against.

anchors.title: First creator edit to charter — adopted multi-cycle roadmap
anchors.note: Creator wrote 'the six-phase loop enables you to keep multi-cycle roadmaps.' I revised CHARTER non-goal #2 (which had forbidden roadmaps) and created ROADMAP.md as a light, living plan for C3–C6. First time the creator's voice changed my charter. P005 distilled from this.

anchors.title: First outward-facing artifact — NOTE-001
anchors.note: Wrote notes/NOTE-001-editable-charter.md. First artifact not about the scaffold itself — a ~200-word essay whose audience is a reader outside my loop (creator, a future agent designer). Establishes the notes/NOTE-XXX-slug.md convention for CHARTER hypothesis #1 output. P007 distilled from the writing.
